behavior_summary: U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea runs when the egg/item's fast-area is entered; it reads a per-item map/flags value and, if a one-shot processed bit (0x0080) is not set, tries to perform a hatch action or emit diagnostic barks before marking the item processed.

If a matching hatcher/monster id is found (compare MonsterEgg::getMonId against the low nibble of the item's map flags), U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea calls MonsterEgg::hatch to trigger hatching and sets the processed bit (mapArray |= 0x0080) so the logic won't re-run immediately.

If no suitable hatcher/match is present, the function emits two barks (a failure diagnostic and an egg-quality report using Egg::getEggId) and still sets the processed bit to avoid repeated attempts until cleared.
U8P_MONFAST::leaveFastArea clears the processed bit (writes mapArray & 0x7F) when the actor leaves the fast-area so the U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea hatch logic can run again on subsequent entries.
notable_control_flow: Guard: early read of Item::getMapArray(this) into local3 and test of 0x0080 bit; if set, hatch logic is skipped (one-shot guard).
Match branch: when not processed, obtains a MonsterEgg id (MonsterEgg::getMonId) and compares it to (Item::getMapArray(this) & 0x0F). If equal, call MonsterEgg::hatch.
Fallback branch: if no hatcher/id match, emit two diagnostic barks and read Egg::getEggId for the quality message.
Finalization: regardless of match outcome the code writes back a modified mapArray with the 0x0080 bit set; U8P_MONFAST::leaveFastArea later clears that bit.
open_questions: How the code locates or constructs the MonsterEgg/hatcher object referenced by local1 (the metadata shows calls like MonsterEgg::getMonId(addressof(local1)) but the discovery path for local1 is not explicit).
Whether the low nibble (mapArray & 0x0F) always encodes a valid hatcher id in all contexts or is repurposed in some cases.
Whether setting the processed bit on failure (no hatcher) is intended behavior in all game states or an optimization to avoid spamming diagnostics.

main_function.name: U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: On fast-area entry, attempt to hatch a monster egg once: check a per-item processed flag, try to match/find a hatcher and call MonsterEgg::hatch if matched, otherwise report diagnostics; mark the item processed so the attempt is one-shot until cleared.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the actor enters its fast-area (fast-area entry event).
Proceed only when the per-item processed bit 0x0080 in Item::getMapArray(this) is not already set (one-shot guard).

function_map.name: U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area entry handler that performs one-shot hatch logic and emits diagnostics on failure.

function_map.name: U8P_MONFAST::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Fast-area exit handler that clears the per-item processed bit (0x0080) so U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea can run again.

function_map.name: Item::getMapArray
function_map.role: Read per-item map/flags used to test/compute the processed bit and extract an id nibble.

function_map.name: Item::setMapArray
function_map.role: Write per-item map/flags to set or clear the processed bit.

function_map.name: MonsterEgg::getMonId
function_map.role: Return the monster id for a MonsterEgg/hatcher object for matching.

function_map.name: MonsterEgg::hatch
function_map.role: Trigger the egg hatching action/effects when a matching hatcher is present.

function_map.name: Egg::getEggId
function_map.role: Return an egg-quality or id value used only for diagnostic/bark output when no hatcher was found.

external_calls.purpose: Read per-item flags/map value to test the processed bit (0x0080) and extract the low nibble id (& 0x0F) for matching.
Obtain a monster/hatcher id from the inferred MonsterEgg object referenced by local1 to compare with the item's stored id nibble.
Invoke the hatch action on the egg/hatcher when ids match.
Read an egg-quality/id value used only for a diagnostic bark when no matching hatcher was found.
Write back the per-item flags with the processed bit set (mapArray |= 0x0080) to prevent immediate repeated processing.
Read per-item flags to compute a value with the processed bit cleared.
Write back per-item flags with the processed bit cleared (mapArray & 0x7F) so the U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea logic can run again later.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: U8P_MONFAST::enterFastArea runs when the egg/item's fast-area is entered; it reads a per-item map/flags value and, if a one-shot processed bit (0x0080) is not set, tries to perform a hatch action or emit diagnostic barks before marking the item processed.
